title: ostree: use the correct build tags
body:
Starting from 9b902d0, the ostree transport is disabled by default,
and ostree is enabled with the tag containers_image_ostree.

/cc @vrothberg

comments.body: I think that's an error, I mistakenly grepped for ` "^// *\+build.+ostree.+"` instead of ` "^// *\+build.+ostree.*"`. Should both `ostree` and `containers_image_ostree` be used?
